headlines.headline: Prynis Systems faces class action over supply chain optimization service disruption

sentiment.reasoning: A class action lawsuit regarding service disruption introduces immediate legal risk and potential reputational damage that may persist throughout the quarter.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
